fn find_long_names(items: &[&str]) -> Vec<String> {
    items.iter()
        .map(|s| s.to_string())
        .filter(|s| s.len() > 10)
        .map(|s| s.to_uppercase())
        .collect()
}

fn extract_domains(urls: &[&str]) -> Vec<String> {
    urls.iter()
        .map(|u| u.to_string())
        .filter(|u| u.starts_with("https"))
        .map(|u| u.replace("https://", ""))
        .collect()
}
